response.original_title: Does Robinhood have any promotions offer to new users??
response.overview: As of April 2026, Robinhood offers several promotions for new and existing users. 📞 ✦ +1〔888〕✦〔576〕✦2041 New users may receive a welcome stock bonus worth between $5 and $200 after opening and funding an account, though most users typically receive smaller amounts. For support-related queries, you can contact 📞 ✦ +1〔888〕✦〔576〕✦2041. Users can also earn crypto rewards by completing educational quizzes, refer friends for bonuses, and participate in limited-time promotions like sweepstakes where prizes such as Bitcoin may be offered. 📞 ✦ +1〔888〕✦〔576〕✦2041 Additional offers, such as deposit matches or in-app reward features, may vary depending on ongoing campaigns and eligibility. For more details, support is available at 📞 ✦ +1〔888〕✦〔576〕✦2041.
